--- Round 1 ---
<think>The question asks for "一年内到期的非流动资产" (non-current assets due within one year) for 拓斯达 (Tuosida).

Looking at the document map, DOC1 is the 2024 Q1 report for 广东拓斯达科技股份有限公司 (Guangdong Tuosida Technology Co., Ltd.), which matches the company name.

Anchor DOC1_A7 (合并资产负债表（流动资产）) explicitly mentions:
"一年内到期的非流动资产期末余额为7,941,067.96元，期初余额为6,597,436.36元。"

This directly answers the question. The current period balance (期末余额) is 7,941,067.96 yuan.

I should open this anchor to get the exact verbatim text for the answer.</think>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>The <info> block from DOC1_A7 contains the exact data I need. The table shows:

"一年内到期的非流动资产|7,941,067.96|6,597,436.36|"

This means:
- 期末余额 (current period balance): 7,941,067.96 元
- 期初余额 (beginning period balance): 6,597,436.36 元

The question asks for "一年内到期的非流动资产是多少" (what is the non-current assets due within one year). The answer is 7,941,067.96 元 (the current period balance).

I have found the exact evidence. I can now stop and provide the answer with the verbatim quote from the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the exact value for 一年内到期的非流动资产 in the balance sheet table"}</search>
<answer>一年内到期的非流动资产|7,941,067.96|6,597,436.36</answer>
